description: Customize the Jitsi Meet user interface for a healthcare context by modifying the English localization file (main.json) within the Jitsi Web Docker container. Change the 'Join meeting' button text to "Enter Consultation" and the name input placeholder text to "Patient Name". Save a screenshot of the updated pre-join screen at http://localhost:8080 to /home/ga/Documents/custom_ui_evidence.png.
